meaning: n.亲密,隐私,亲昵行为(尤指不正当的性关系)
examples: The opening of the scene depicts Akhnaten and his family in a moment of intimacy.
Haptics in communication often suggest the level of intimacy.
Closeness, for example, indicates intimacy or threat to many speakers.
Online we can develop a kind of intimacy that eluded us in the nonvirtual world.
Takal coaxes melodrama from first-person naturalism and smartly blends the allure of genre with do-it-yourself intimacy.
